import { async } from '../scheduler/async'; import { isValidDate } from '../util/isDate'; import { timeout } from './timeout'; export function timeoutWith(due, withObservable, scheduler) { let first; let each; let _with; scheduler = scheduler !== null && scheduler !== void 0 ? scheduler : async; if (isValidDate(due)) { first = due; } else if (typeof due === 'number') { each = due; } if (withObservable) { _with = () => withObservable; } else { throw new TypeError('No observable provided to switch to'); } if (first == null && each == null) { throw new TypeError('No timeout provided.'); } return timeout({ first, each, scheduler, with: _with, }); } //# sourceMappingURL=timeoutWith.js.map
